q: What is Gojan School of Business and Technology?
a: Gojan School of Business and Technology (GSBT) is an autonomous engineering college established in 2005, located on an 80-acre campus at Redhills, Chennai. It is affiliated to Anna University, accredited by NAAC, recognized by AICTE and UGC.
Gojan is located at Gojan College Road, Edapalayam, Alamathi via, Redhills, Chennai, Tamil Nadu - 600 052.

q: What is the TNEA code for Gojan?
a: The TNEA counselling code for Gojan School of Business and Technology is 1123.

q: What courses are offered at Gojan?
a: Gojan offers 14 UG programmes and 1 PG programme. B.E. courses: Aeronautical, CSE, CSE (AI&ML), CSE (Cyber Security), ECE, Computer & Communication, Mechanical & Automation, Medical Electronics, Bio Technology, Robotics & Automation. B.Tech courses: IT, Pharmaceutical Technology, AI & Data Science, CSBS. PG: MBA.

q: How do I apply to Gojan?
a: For engineering, apply through TNEA counselling (code 1123) conducted by Anna University. For MBA, apply through TANCET. You can also apply online through the official website https://gsbt.edu.in/
Contact Gojan at +91 70107 23984 or landline 044-2631 1045, or email gsbt@gsbt.edu.in.

q: Is Gojan affiliated to Anna University?
a: Yes, Gojan is affiliated to Anna University, Chennai. As an autonomous institution, GSBT designs its own curriculum while remaining affiliated to Anna University.
Yes, Gojan School of Business and Technology is accredited by NAAC and has an IQAC (Internal Quality Assurance Cell) for quality oversight.
Gojan has an 80-acre campus at Redhills, Chennai with modern labs, library, sports facilities, hostel, and WiFi connectivity throughout.
Yes, Gojan provides separate hostel facilities for boys and girls within the campus. The hostels have 24x7 security, CCTV, WiFi, furnished rooms, and nutritious food.

The campus has library, modern computer labs, WiFi throughout, sports grounds for 11 sports plus gym, canteen, separate hostels, R&D cell, counseling services, and bus transport from 14 routes across Chennai.
Gojan School of Business and Technology was established in 2005.

q: What is the eligibility for admission?
a: For B.E./B.Tech, complete 12th with PCM, minimum 45% aggregate for general category (40% for reserved). Admissions through TNEA counselling code 1123.

q: Does Gojan have a placement cell?
a: Yes, Gojan has a dedicated Training and Placement Cell with a Corporate Connect programme. The 2023 batch received 250+ offers with highest package of 5.5 LPA.
The official email is gsbt@gsbt.edu.in. For admissions, email admission@gojaneducation.tech.
Yes, Gojan offers MBA (Master of Business Administration). Admission requires TANCET score with minimum 50% in Bachelor's degree (45% for reserved).
Gojan has various student clubs under Gojan Clubs, an active NSS wing, IEEE Student Branch, ISTE Chapter, and an Entrepreneurship Development Cell (EDC).
Yes, Gojan is recognized by AICTE, New Delhi and also by UGC (University Grants Commission).

q: What is the vision of Gojan?
a: To create a dynamic, optimistic, and committed community of educated youth by providing a conducive learning environment at an affordable cost, while delivering proper training to empower students with leadership potential and employable skills.

q: Does Gojan have AI ML course?
a: Yes, Gojan offers B.E. Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in AI and ML. It is one of 14 UG programmes offered.

q: Does Gojan have Cyber Security course?
a: Yes, Gojan offers B.E. Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Cyber Security.

Yes, Gojan provides state-of-the-art bus transport with 14 routes covering North, South, and West Chennai areas including Pulianthope, Aminjikarai, Kundrathur, Perambur, Minjur, Tondiarpet, Maduravoyal, Ennore, and more.

Gojan has 15 departments: Aeronautical, CSE, CSE (AI&ML), CSE (Cyber Security), AI & Data Science, CSBS, Computer & Communication, ECE, IT, Mechanical & Automation, Medical Electronics, Bio Technology, Pharmaceutical Technology, Robotics & Automation, and MBA.

q: Tell me about the AI ML course
a: The B.E. CSE with AI & ML specialization at Gojan covers artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, and data science. It is affiliated to Anna University and approved by AICTE.
For detailed fee structure, contact the admissions office at +91 70107 23984 or email gsbt@gsbt.edu.in.

Top recruiters include HCL Technologies, HP, Siemens, Airtel, ICICI Bank, Sutherland, Global Scholar, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Cognizant. The 2023 batch had 250+ offers with highest package of 5.5 LPA.

q: Does Gojan have a coding club?
a: Yes, Gojan has various technical clubs under Gojan Clubs including coding, robotics, and IEEE Student Branch activities.

q: What is the bus route from Chennai Central?
a: Gojan provides 14 bus routes across Chennai. Routes cover Pulianthope, Perambur, Tondiarpet, and nearby areas. For specific details, contact +91 70107 23984.

Gojan has a beautiful 80-acre campus with modern labs, library, sports grounds for 11 sports, gym, hostel, WiFi throughout, R&D cell, canteen, counseling services, and green spaces at Redhills, Chennai.

Gojan has an active NSS wing that inculcates the spirit of voluntary community service and social responsibility through sustained community interactions, blood donation camps, and social awareness programmes.
The campus has facilities for Cricket, Football, Volleyball, Basketball, Hockey, Handball, Kabaddi, Kho-Kho, Ball Badminton, Tennis, Athletics, and a gym.
Gojan library has a wide collection of books, journals, and digital resources for all departments.
Yes, GSBT has a Research and Development (R&D) Cell on campus. Faculty and students engage in research with publications in national and international journals.
Gojan facilitates government scholarships and institutional scholarships. Sponsorship is also provided to students and alumni for higher education.
B.E. Aeronautical Engineering at Gojan covers aircraft design, propulsion, aerodynamics, and is affiliated to Anna University and approved by AICTE.
B.E. Electronics and Communication Engineering covers signal processing, VLSI, communication systems, and embedded systems.
B.E. Mechanical and Automation Engineering covers thermodynamics, manufacturing, CAD/CAM, and automation technologies.
B.E. Medical Electronics Engineering covers biomedical instrumentation, medical imaging, and healthcare technology.
B.Tech Information Technology covers software development, databases, networking, web technologies, and cloud computing.

Yes, Gojan School of Business and Technology is an autonomous institution. As an autonomous college, GSBT designs its own curriculum, syllabus, and academic regulations while remaining affiliated to Anna University.

q: What is the website of Gojan?
a: The official website of Gojan School of Business and Technology is https://gsbt.edu.in/

q: Tell me about Bio Technology course
a: B.E. Bio Technology at Gojan covers biotechnology, genetic engineering, and bioprocess technology. It is approved by AICTE and affiliated to Anna University.
B.Tech Pharmaceutical Technology at Gojan covers pharmaceutical sciences, drug design, and formulation technology.
B.E. Robotics and Automation Engineering at Gojan covers robotics, industrial automation, control systems, and IoT technologies.

q: Tell me about AI and Data Science course
a: B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at Gojan covers AI, data analytics, big data, machine learning, and business intelligence.
B.Tech Computer Science and Business Systems at Gojan combines computer science with business systems and management concepts. It is a TCS designed curriculum.

q: Tell me about Computer Communication course
a: B.E. Computer and Communication Engineering at Gojan covers computer networks, communication systems, signal processing, and embedded systems.
The 2023 batch received over 250 placement offers. The highest package was 5.5 LPA, average package was 2.5 LPA. Recruiters include HCL, HP, Siemens, Airtel, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Cognizant.

q: What is the highest package at Gojan?
a: The highest salary package offered at GSBT was 5.5 lakhs per annum (LPA) for the 2023 batch. The average package was 2.5 LPA.
